tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate A offered help, but I must decline to keep our shared workload balanced. Their request highlights the need for clear boundaries to protect my project timeline.

desires: Re-establish clear boundaries with teammate_A immediately to prevent future work dumping, even if it risks a momentary awkwardness.
Protect my sleep debt of 2 hours by refusing to take on the extra task unless there is a concrete, negotiated plan for shared ownership moving forward.
Maintain trust and closeness within the cohort_3 group by ensuring I don't appear unreliable or overburdened in our next meeting.

goals.description: Initiate a direct text conversation with teammate_A to explicitly state that I am declining the extra task and re-establish clear boundaries regarding future work dumping.
goals.rationale: My value system prioritizes relationships over task outcomes, but 'assertive' conflict handling means I cannot let this boundary slide without direct communication. The risk of awkwardness is secondary to preventing an unsustainable dynamic that would ultimately damage our long-term group trust.

goals.description: Draft a concrete negotiation proposal for shared ownership of tasks moving forward, emphasizing that I only agree to help if we have a structured plan, not just ad-hoc requests.
goals.rationale: As a 'deliberate' planner, I need to set up a framework now rather than reacting later. This protects my sleep debt (currently at 2 hours) while keeping the door open for collaboration under fair terms, balancing my need for health with the desire to maintain closeness.

goals.description: Complete my assigned portion of the project by 19:00 so I can attend the cohort_3 meeting without appearing unreliable or overburdened.
goals.rationale: While finishing my own work is necessary to maintain my reputation within the close friend group, it is secondary to the immediate boundary-setting action. Once the conversation with teammate_A is resolved, I will prioritize this task.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances g1 (direct boundary setting) and g2 (negotiation framework). Prioritizes relationship integrity over task completion; declining now prevents future resentment and protects my sleep debt.

action.name: message

args.content: Hey. I can't take your part today. We need a plan, not ad-hoc dumping. Let's discuss boundaries now.

action.reasoning: Advances g1 (direct boundary setting) and g2 (negotiation framework). Prioritizes relationship integrity over task completion; declining now prevents future resentment and protects my sleep debt.

trajectory.observation: Messaged teammate_A: 'Hey. I can't take your part today. We need a plan, not ad-ho'.
